last_assistant_message:
The audit ran clean end-to-end (no JS errors, no console errors, no page errors across 96 simulated months). Screenshot saved at `.playwright-cli/audit-screenshot.png`.

# FinLife Audit Report

**Test coverage**: Loaded game â†’ started as "Audit Bot" â†’ interacted with Inbox, Business, Side Hustle buttons â†’ aged 96 months (8 years) while auto-dismissing events â†’ captured state snapshots throughout.

## âœ… What Works

| System | Status |
|---|---|
| Page load & screens | Clean, no errors |
| Stock catalog | 88 stocks across 11 sectors âœ“ |
| Crypto catalog | 41 coins across 9 categories âœ“ |
| Auto-hire at age 22+ | âœ“ Got hired as Electrician |
| Career progression | Salary grew $0 â†’ $97.8k over 8yr |
| Boss morale system | 66% Â· Safe â€” tracking performance âœ“ |
| Annual boss message | 3 messages posted from "Dana Rhodes" |
| Bill reports (Jan/Jun) | 6 reports posted âœ“ |
| Inbox button + modal | Opens correctly âœ“ |
| Business button guard | Correct toast when no business âœ“ |
| Life tab split income | Salary $87.2k / Side $0 / Total $87.2k âœ“ |
| Belongings from purchases | 73 items accumulated, sellable âœ“ |
| JS errors | Zero across full simulation |

## âš ï¸� Issues & Recommendations

### ðŸ”´ Critical: **Checking spiraled to âˆ’$169k** 
Bot deferred every monthly expense â†’ force-pay cycle crushed the account. Credit score hit the 300 floor within 3 years.
- **Fix**: cap `pendingExpenses` at ~3 concurrent items, or block deferring when checking is near zero
- **Fix**: when a deferred item auto-pays and pushes balance negative, try `savings` before going negative

### ðŸŸ¡ High: **Inbox 40-cap too aggressive**
Across 8 yr of play there are ~125 items generated (96 news + 16 bill reports + ~8 boss + ~3 downsides). Only 40 fit. Boss messages and bill reports â€” the things users care about â€” get pushed out by generic news briefs.
- **Fix**: raise cap to 100, OR use per-type caps (e.g., keep all boss msgs + last 20 news + last 12 bill reports)

### ðŸŸ¡ High: **Belongings grow huge but user never prompted to sell**
73 items after 8 yr. Likely $10k+ of resale value sitting idle while checking is deeply negative.
- **Fix**: surface `Belongings: total resale $X` in the Assets summary, maybe nudge when checking is negative

### ðŸŸ¢ Medium: **Monthly expense events too frequent**
Event fires ~30% of months and each spawns a potential purchase. Realistic for a young adult but compounds brutally with deferring.
- **Fix**: reduce to 15â€“20% OR scale with lifestyle (frugal = 10%, lavish = 40%)

### ðŸŸ¢ Medium: **Side hustle affordability not surfaced**
Bot clicked "Cybersecurity Consulting" needing $1.5k but only had $500; got a rejection string. A human player has the same experience.
- **Fix**: grey out or annotate unaffordable hustle options in the modal

### ðŸŸ¢ Low: **Downside messages share "bill" type with Bill Reports**
Makes filtering/reading harder. User might not distinguish routine bills from surprise events.
- **Fix**: add a third type like `'downside'` with a distinct icon/color (orange vs. grey)

### ðŸŸ¢ Low: **No auto-hire log in inbox**
"Got job: Electrician" logs to the Life feed but not the inbox. Users who live in the inbox will miss the hire moment.
- **Fix**: post a ðŸ’¼ "New Job: Electrician" inbox item on hire

## Snapshot of simulated 30yo character

```
Age 30 Â· Electrician Â· Salary $97.8k Â· Side $0 Â· Morale 66% Safe
Checking âˆ’$141k Â· Credit 300 Â· Belongings 73 Â· Inbox 40 (capped)
Boss msgs preserved: 3 / ~8 expected
Bill reports preserved: 6 / ~16 expected
```

Want me to implement any of the recommendations? The checking-spiral fix and the inbox cap fix would give the biggest quality-of-life improvement.
Live. Opening Work now shows **ðŸ’¼ Careers** / **âš¡ Side Projects** tabs at the top of the modal â€” click to swap the list. https://noahmbrown2-pixel.github.io/finlife-simulator/

Live. Qualified soccer players now get:

- **August** â€” Champions/Europa/Conference League league-phase fixtures: 8 matchdays, 4 home / 4 away, with full format explanation (top 8 â†’ R16, 9â€“24 â†’ knockout playoff, 25â€“36 â†’ eliminated).
- **June** â€” Campaign summary: league-phase finish (1â€“36), knockout playoff (if needed), R16 â†’ QF â†’ SF â†’ Final results with two-legged aggregates, penalty shootouts on ties, single-match final, and the tournament winner.

Team pool spans Europe, North America (MLS + Liga MX), and South America (BrasileirÃ£o + Argentina Primera). https://noahmbrown2-pixel.github.io/finlife-simulator/

All ideas shipped into `bitlife-finance.html` as a single additive ~700-line block, all 24 smoke tests passing.

**What was added:**

| System | Features |
|---|---|
| **Personal life** | Pet adoption (7 species, aging, death, monthly upkeep), 5 friends w/ closeness drift, marriage-gated child action, charity donations w/ happiness + credit boost, will (% to kids vs charity), checkup + elective surgery actions |
| **Finance** | Personal loans w/ credit-score-tiered APR (6/9/13/20%), 5-yr Treasury bonds (~4.5% compound), S&P 500 index funds (climate-driven), April tax filing event w/ charity deduction + audit chance |
| **Career** | Headhunter offers in inbox w/ Accept/Counter buttons (10â€“40% bumps), 5 new HR/legal/fire downsides |
| **Sports** | Mid-year award lottery (MVP/RoY/All-Star/etc) w/ cash bonus, monthly injury rolls (2â€“8 month rehab, lost earnings), trade demand inbox events, HoF auto-induction at 3 awards & 38+, post-playing coaching/broadcasting offers, biennial national-team callups |
| **Business** | IPO at $5M+ valuation (40% cash proceeds), competitor acquisition, franchise expansion w/ annual royalties, one-time pivot |
| **Lifestyle** | 10-city travel w/ buffs, 7 hobby/collectible types that appreciate, casino w/ jackpot tier (0.5% chance Ã— 100Ã—) |
| **Public** | 4-step political ladder (mayorâ†’president) w/ campaign costs + approval gates, influencer follower counter w/ casual/grind cadences + ad revenue + brand deals |
| **Random** | Long-lost-relative inheritance (~$20kâ€“$1.5M), bigger lottery |
| **Polish** | Multi-named save slots, scrapbook timeline modal, NG+ heir continuation (1% of net worth, capped at $5M, generation counter) |

**UI:** 5 new action buttons (Family / Loans / Lifestyle / Public / Menu), a "Life Extras" pill row on the Life tab, and IPO/Acquire/Franchise/Pivot buttons appended per-business in the Business tab.

**Test file:** `.playwright-cli/extras-test.js` â€” covers state migration, every new modal, every new mutation function, headhunter accept flow, business macro-moves, save/load round-trip, NG+ continuation, and a 30-month live tick with no console errors.

# ðŸŽ¯ Job Swarm Test Report

**Result: 226/226 passed** âœ… (every job in the game)

## Per-sector results

| Sector | Passed | Notes |
|--------|--------|-------|
| Healthcare | 24/24 âœ… | Doctor $339k, Surgeon $397k |
| Finance | 22/22 âœ… | Accountant, Financial Advisor |
| Tech | 26/26 âœ… | Software Dev, Data Scientist |
| Education | 14/14 âœ… | Teacher, Professor, Tutor |
| Law | 20/20 âœ… | Lawyer, Police Officer |
| Creative | 20/20 âœ… | Actor, Photographer |
| Trades | 25/25 âœ… | Electrician, Plumber |
| Service | 22/22 âœ… | Chef, Waiter, Barber |
| Transport | 15/15 âœ… | Pilot $254k, Truck Driver |
| Other (env/agri) | 21/21 âœ… | Architect, Civil Engineer |
| Sports | 17/17 âœ… | All season cycles ran clean |

## What was checked per job
- `applyForJob` correctly sets `employed`, `jobId`, `jobTitle`, `jobSector`, `careerTierId`, and `bossMorale`
- Salary lands inside the smarts-modified band `[minÃ—1.15, maxÃ—1.15]`
- 3 monthly career ticks complete without throwing
- Sports jobs additionally exercised 30 sports-offer ticks; soccer/football/hockey players ran their season cycles (`tickSoccerSeason`, `tickNFLSeason`, `tickNHLSeason`) without crashing

## Bugs found / fixed during the sweep
- **Test-harness bug** (now fixed in `.playwright-cli/job-swarm-runner.js`): originally passed `{}` instead of `[]` to `tickCareerNew(char, ev)`. Two jobs (`physical_therapist`, `wildlife_biologist`) hit a promotion branch that calls `ev.push(...)` and crashed. After the fix, both pass.
- **Random layoffs** (game working as designed): with default boss morale, ~1â€“2 jobs per run randomly hit a layoff during 3 ticks. The harness now treats layoff as a valid outcome (no crash = pass) and reports it via `laidOffAfterTicks`.

**No real game-code bugs surfaced.** Swarm dispatched 11 parallel agents (one per sector); all reported back within ~25s.
